title: After the Arima Kinen: Handing Off the Friendship Baton ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeeeey! ☆
Aaah-hahahaha!
Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios fly down the
track with unbelievable speed. With the thrill of
the race rushing through them, it seems they
might be able to overcome every last one of their
limits. But...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the cruel hurdle of distance rears its ugly
head.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I can't anymore! Girlypop, it's all up to you now!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You take it from here! Bring it home,
siiiiis! ☆★☆★☆★

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Helios! Thanks for the mad vibes! I'll take it from
here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Time to go off off! Love you, bestieeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that declaration of friendship, Mejiro Palmer
shows the world a mad runaway the likes of which
they've never seen. And then...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer passes the flagging Daitaku Helios!
Aaaand she crosses the finish liiine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I did iiiiit! This is the best! This is freakin' liiiiit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is me! Mejiro Palmer! In... the...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hooouse!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She fled, she learned, and now she runs. Her
burgeoning independent spirit radiates off of her.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Pal-mer... Pal-mer...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Pal-mer! Pal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Pal-mer! Pal-mer!
PAL-MER! PAL-MER!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
PAL-MER! PAL-MER!
PAL-MER! PAL-MER!
PAL-MER! PAL-MER!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Those voices... They're chanting... Ahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
My name...
YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cheers she's waited so long for have arrived.
Her name echoes throughout Nakayama
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has acknowledged her. She may be the
black sheep of the Mejiro family, but she is also
the magnificent runaway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You dummyyyy! Are you tryin' to make me cry?! I
love you so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's so overcome with emotion, I don't put too
much stock in her words. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Congrats, Palmer. There was just no catching up
to you today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Even if you walk a different road, those are
still unmistakably the guts of a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ryan... McQueen... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I may not seem much like a Mejiro... but I am
indeed Mejiro Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yassss! You did it, queen! ☆ Oh man, here comes
the waterworks! I love you, Palmster!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Helios! I don't even know what's going on
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Just go and show them! Show everyone what I've
been wanting to see more than anything! The
audience is waiting! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The thing you've been wanting to see... That's
right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The place she's wanted to stand more than
anywhere—the place where she can declare her
independence—is waiting for her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Watch this, guys! I'm about to slay for real!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Waheeeeeyyyyy! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer steps into the winner's circle with
momentous energy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Heya, everyone! Go ahead and put your hands up
for a party that's sure to go down in history! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Iiiiit's Mejiro Palmer's Grand Prix Extravaganza!
Woohooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows no signs of hesitation—she's just
sharing good vibes and having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, thank you all so much for your
support! ☆ It's not like all us Mejiros think we're
VIPs or anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There are others who think they don't have the
rizz to make their dreams come true, just like I did
back when I was still taking L's. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But there's a direct line from when I was so down
back then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And my vibes today. It's like, I can be me now because I was how I was back then. Y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you just gotta do what you like. And
that means you gotta know what you like! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If you're hurting, run! ♪ Then you can fly! And the
most important thing you gotta do is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Smile a bunch! ☆ The other side of that smile is
where your besties are at! ☆★☆★☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's talking both to her past self and to anyone
currently feeling trapped the way she did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (There's one final thing...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Should I say it? I'm gonna say it! Yeah, here goes
nothin'!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Let's. Leave. That. Maaark!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Umm... And one more thing. This is something I've
always wanted to yell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmer gulps down a deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Waaaheeeyyy! ☆
Are you watching, Grandmamaaaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for being such a weirdo! But look at me
now! I did it! ★ Waheeeyyy! Love youuu! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crickets...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH! Now I've done it! I'm done for!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: RUN AWAAAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer finishes her speech off with an
impossible full-body dive...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And flees the scene faster than she's ever run in a
race.
